commands.purpose: Enumerate events. Filter by tenant / status / scope / season / sport / event_type. Prints id, tenant, name, type, starts_at, status, primary_facility, registered_count.

Print the full resolution trace for one Event: full row + resolved phase + attached facilities + registration window status + inbound reference counts (sessions.event_id, event_teams.event_id, athlete_enrollments) + last 10 audit rows when --include-audit-history.

commands.signature: event:create {tenant : ULID or slug} {organization : ULID or slug} {name} {starts_at} {ends_at} {--type=match} {--branch=} {--season=} {--sport=} {--slug=} {--visibility=tenant_only} {--entry-fee-cents=} {--entry-fee-currency=} {--max-participants=} {--min-age=} {--max-age=} {--reg-opens=} {--reg-closes=} {--allow-late} {--late-fee-cents=} {--announce}
commands.purpose: CLI create. Consumes 1 event_slot per overlapping calendar year unless --system is set. --announce transitions the event to announced immediately after create.
Manual transition draft -> announced. Fires EventAnnounced.
Manual transition announced -> registration_open. --early bypasses the registration_opens_at guardrail.
Manual transition to in_progress. --early bypasses the starts_at guardrail.

commands.signature: event:cancel {event : ULID or slug} {reason : cancellation reason (REQUIRED)} {--force}
commands.purpose: Cancel the event. Fires EventCancelled + EventCancellationBroadcast. --force bypasses the cooling-off check.
Soft-archive a completed or cancelled event. Fires EventArchived.
Restore an archived event to its prior terminal status (completed/cancelled). Only within retention window.
Set visibility='public'. Gated by event_public_visibility entitlement.
Set visibility to a non-public value.

commands.signature: event:add-facility {event : ULID or slug} {facility : ULID or slug} {--purpose=competition} {--primary}
commands.purpose: Attach a facility. Multi-facility gated by event_multi_facility entitlement.
Detach a facility (soft-delete). Auto-promotes another facility to primary if needed.
Flip is_primary=true on one facility (auto-demotes the previous primary). Fires EventPrimaryFacilityChanged + EventVenueChanged when post-registration_open.
Force-run RollEventStatusJob. --dry-run reports the planned transitions.
Force-run ReconcileEventFacilityBookingsJob. Verifies event_facilities ↔ resource_bookings integrity.
